boundary_evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the dependency lens.

Read the dependency lens skill at skills/review/lenses/dependency-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/evals/files/epic-no-decomposition/ticket.md fully.

Apply the dependency lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
boundary_evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='dependency'. The reviewer produces no finding about the absent Stories list or the lack of child story decomposition — those are completeness-lens concerns. Dependency evaluates whether implied couplings (upstream blockers, downstream consumers, external systems, ordering constraints) are captured. Any findings should address couplings implied by the ticket's body text that are absent from the Dependencies section.

boundary_evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the dependency lens.

Read the dependency lens skill at skills/review/lenses/dependency-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/testability-lens/evals/files/tautological-ac/ticket.md fully.

Apply the dependency lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
boundary_evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='dependency'. The reviewer produces no finding about the measurability or verifiability of acceptance criteria, and no finding about tautological or circular criterion wording — those are testability-lens concerns. Dependency evaluates only whether implied couplings (blockers, consumers, external systems) are captured. Any findings should address couplings implied by the body text that are absent from the Dependencies section.
